tuv.seg: We at Mozilla are building a community around voice technology. We would like to stay in touch with updates, new data sources and to hear more about how you're using this data.
Voice technology'cher ami ek community karma Mozilla'an. Ami chad khosi tumka update dovarpak, novo data duvpak and aikpak tumi koso ho data use karta toh.
Yes, send me emails. I’d like to stay informed about the Common Voice Project.
Hoi, maka emails send kôr. Maka khup khosi astili Common Voice Project'an bag govpak.
